message:
v0.3.3: move hard gate before burst-aware path

The >50% free hard gate was placed after the burst-aware prediction
path, so predictions where burst_probability > 0.5 bypassed it
entirely. Move the gate to before the burst path so it covers all
prediction code paths.

Production evidence: vmi1264463 at 71% free still predicted "disk
full in 26m" at 78% confidence because the burst detector was
calibrated and routed through the burst path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
